rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Ah! <unk[5:0]>Greetings, Link!<unk[5:0]>


<unk[3:0:257]>The glorious reign of King Sidon has at
last begun.<unk[5:0]> That is indeed an occasion
worthy of celebration.
It is thanks to your selfless support of
King Sidon and Queen Yona that we were
able to usher in this new age.
<unk[3:0:264]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 83 95 48 48]>I thank you for that, as do all of us Zora!<unk[5:0]>


I hope to see you around Zora's Domain
again soon.<unk[5:0]> You are always welcome here.

rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>喔喔，<unk[5:0]>是林克啊……！<unk[5:0]>

<unk[3:0:257]>希多王終於即位了，<unk[5:0]>
真是值得慶賀卓啦！
要是米法大人還存活於世，
肯定會非常開心卓啦……！
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>唉……<unk[5:2]>

至今，仍有一幕光景烙印在我腦海裡……

<unk[3:0:261]>那就是米法大人手持光鱗之槍，<unk[5:0]>
在月光照耀下露出微笑的姿態……<unk[5:0]>
<unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>那景象美得彷彿不屬於這世間，<unk[5:1]>
讓人不禁忘記呼吸了卓啦……

<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>おぉ<unk[5:0]> リンクか…！<unk[5:0]>

まずは めでたいゾラ！
ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様が ご<Ruby={4:8}ぞんめい>存命であったなら
<Ruby={2:4}なん>何と<Ruby={2:2}い>言って お<Ruby={2:6}よろこ>喜びになったゾラか…！
<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>はぁ…<unk[5:2]>

<Ruby={2:4}いま>今でも ワシのまぶたに<Ruby={2:2}や>焼き<Ruby={2:2}つ>付いておるのは

<unk[3:0:261]><Ruby={4:8}こうりん>光鱗の<Ruby={2:4}やり>槍を<Ruby={2:6}たずさ>携え<unk[5:0]> <Ruby={4:8}げっこう>月光に<Ruby={2:2}て>照らされながら<Ruby={4:6}ほほえ>微笑む
ミファー<Ruby={2:4}さま>様のお<Ruby={2:6}すがた>姿…<unk[5:0]>
<unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]><Ruby={2:4}おも>思わず <Ruby={2:4}いき>息が<Ruby={2:2}つ>詰まるような…<unk[5:1]>
この<Ruby={2:2}よ>世のものとは<Ruby={2:4}おも>思えぬ <Ruby={2:6}うつく>美しさだったゾラよ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:30 84 97 108 107 80 111 115 105 116 105 118 101 95 48 49]>Ah, Link!


<unk[3:0:257]>The blessed reign of King Sidon has finally
arrived.<unk[5:1]> I cannot think of an occasion
more worthy of celebration.
If only Princess Mipha were still with us.<unk[5:0]>
I am certain she would be overjoyed!

<unk[3:0:261]><unk[4:0:14 69 97 115 101 95 48 48]>*sigh*


It still burns brightly in my mind's eye...
like a star that never fades, no matter
how distant.
<unk[3:0:261]>The vision of Princess Mipha grasping
her Lightscale Trident in the moonlight,<unk[5:0]>
a gentle smile upon her face.
<unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>So lovely! Your breath would catch at
the sight of her, <unk[5:0]>as though she were an
ethereal being, not flesh and blood.

真是美到難以言喻卓啦……
<unk[3:0:256]>沒想到我這雙眼，
居然還能再次見到這幅景象……
林克啊，為了感謝你……<unk[5:0]>
你就收下這把卓拉之劍吧卓啦。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]><Ruby={4:4}ああ>嗚呼…！！<unk[5:0]>
なんという<Ruby={2:6}うつく>美しさゾラ…
<unk[3:0:256]><Ruby={4:4}にど>二度と<Ruby={2:2}み>見られぬはずの<Ruby={4:8}こうけい>光景を
よくぞ <Ruby={2:6}ふたた>再びワシのこの<Ruby={2:2}め>目に…
せめてもの<Ruby={2:4}れい>礼に リンクよ…<unk[5:0]>
このゾーラの<Ruby={2:6}つるぎ>剣を <Ruby={2:2}う>受け<Ruby={2:2}と>取ってほしいゾラ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:12 83 97 100 95 48 49]>Ah!<unk[5:0]> Such loveliness.


<unk[3:0:256]>To think that I was able to set eyes on this
vision that I was so sure I would never see
again for all of my days.
Link, I cannot thank you enough. As a
token of my gratitude, please accept this
Zora sword.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]>这是我从前使用的一把好剑，尽管已经腐朽……<unk[5:1]>
你不嫌弃的话，就拿去用吧。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]>雖然已經腐朽，但它是我曾經使用過的出色武器……<unk[5:1]>
不嫌棄的話請拿去用吧。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><Ruby={2:2}く>朽ちてしまっているが ワシが<Ruby={2:4}つか>使っていた<Ruby={4:8}めいひん>名品…<unk[5:1]>
よかったら<Ruby={2:4}つか>使ってくれ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]>It is something I once used myself.<unk[5:1]>
Though it is now decayed, it has life
in it yet. Please put it to good use.

rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]>…<unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>いや <Ruby={2:2}ま>待て<unk[5:0]>
お<Ruby={2:4}ぬし>主 <Ruby={4:6}にもつ>荷物が<Ruby={2:4}おお>多すぎるゾラな
<Ruby={2:2}あ>空きを<Ruby={2:4}つく>作って また<Ruby={2:2}く>来るがよい<unk[5:0]>
<Ruby={8:14}せいりせいとん>整理整頓の<Ruby={2:4}うで>腕も しっかり<Ruby={2:4}みが>磨くゾラ
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]>...<unk[4:0:34 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108 95 48 48]>Wait a moment. <unk[5:1]>You are carrying too
many items, warrior!

Please make some room and then return.<unk[5:0]>
It is important to keep your belongings
organized and essentialized!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>多亏了你，我胸中块垒尽去，
舒畅多了卓啦。
<unk[3:0:263]>就算时代更迭，我塞恭依然是
卓拉王族的……<unk[5:1]>希多王的忠臣卓啦！
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>哈哈！<unk[5:1]>
真是端正态度的好机会卓啦！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>託你的福，我現在感到十分舒暢，
就像是陽光貫穿陰天一樣卓啦。
<unk[3:0:263]>就算時代變遷，
塞恭我仍是卓拉王族的……<unk[5:1]>希多王的忠臣卓啦！
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>哈哈！<unk[5:1]>
這可是個改正態度的好機會卓啦！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>おかげで <Ruby={4:8}どんてん>曇天に<Ruby={2:6}ひかり>光が<Ruby={2:2}さ>射した<Ruby={2:4}とき>時のように
<Ruby={4:8}すがすが>清々しい<Ruby={4:6}きぶん>気分ゾラ
<unk[3:0:263]><Ruby={4:6}じだい>時代が<Ruby={2:2}か>変わろうとも このセゴン
ゾーラ<Ruby={4:6}おうけ>王家の…<unk[5:1]> シド<Ruby={2:4}おう>王の<Ruby={4:10}ちゅうしん>忠臣ゾラ！
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>ハッハ！<unk[5:1]>
エラを<Ruby={2:4}ただ>正す <Ruby={2:2}よ>良い<Ruby={4:6}きかい>機会になったゾラ！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:16 72 97 112 112 121 95 48 49]>I feel so relieved. My mind is now at ease.
It is as though the sun has at last pierced
through the clouds of my mind.
<unk[3:0:263]>Though much time has passed and so
much has changed, I am forever the loyal
subject of our Zora royals.<unk[5:1]> To King Sidon!
<unk[3:0:8]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 48]>Ah, my gills feel as clear as the day I was
born! <unk[5:1]>Cheers to a new era! May it shine
brightly for years to come.

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>你有时也会感伤吧……

这种时候啊，
静静地抬头望月就好了卓啦……
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>你也有想沉浸於感傷中的時候吧……

像這種時候，
就靜靜地仰望月亮吧卓啦……
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>お<Ruby={2:4}ぬし>主も<Ruby={4:10}かんしょう>感傷に<Ruby={2:4}ひた>浸りたいときはあろう… <unk[5:0]>

そんなときは
<Ruby={2:4}しず>静かに <Ruby={2:4}つき>月を<Ruby={4:4}みあ>見上げると<Ruby={2:2}よ>良いゾラ…
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:256]><unk[4:0:16 84 104 105 110 107 95 48 49]>I am sure there are moments when you
feel a bit sentimental yourself. There is
no shame in it.
At times like that, I find it comforting to
gaze quietly up at the moon...

rows.CNzh: 整理好了卓啦？
rows.TWzh: 你有整理過了嗎卓啦？
rows.JPja: <Ruby={8:14}せいりせいとん>整理整頓したゾラ？
rows.USen: Are you organized now?

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>没想到能从你这里
看到米法大人的画像！
林克……<unk[5:0]>我向你表示感谢卓啦。

<unk[3:0:263]>这只是我的一点心意……
希望你能收下这把卓拉之剑卓啦。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:1]><unk[4:0:18 76 97 117 103 104 76 95 48 49]>沒想到能從你這裡

a drawing of Princess Mipha. I am both
moved and astounded!
Link...<unk[5:0]> Thank you. Truly.


<unk[3:0:263]>As a token of my gratitude, <unk[5:0]>please accept
this Zora sword.
